title: Guidelines & Pilgrim's Bag
description: Practical tips and Shariah guidelines, as well as an interactive packing checklist to prepare all travel necessities with peace of mind.

bag.title: Electronic Pilgrim's Bag
bag.subtitle: Prepare travel necessities step-by-step, and we will save your progress automatically.
bag.progressCompleted: 🎉 Congratulations! Your bag is fully ready for the blessed Umrah journey. We ask Allah to make it easy and accept it from you.

items.text: Passport and Umrah visa (printed and digital copy)
National ID or personal residence permit (Iqama)
Flight tickets, hotel and transport confirmations
Small amount of cash and Mada/Visa bank card
Essential medicines with your special medical reports
Ihram clothing for men (two white sheets) / modest comfortable clothes for women
Ihram belt for men (with pockets to keep ID and money)
Comfortable shoes for Tawaf and Sa'i (preferably seamless for men)
A small booklet of supplications and dhikr or mobile application
Small scissors or shaver to use at tahallul (de-consecration)
Unscented shampoo and soap (for Ihram days)
Vaseline or moisturizer to protect thighs and skin from chafing
Light umbrella to protect you from the hot Makkah sun
Small nail clipper to prepare Sunnahs before Ihram
Mobile phone with its suitable chargers
Portable power bank to charge the phone at the Haram
Three-pin electrical plug suitable for the Kingdom
Light backpack or waist bag to keep shoes and belongings

health.title: Health & Organizational Tips
items: Drink plenty of cold and warm Zamzam water to avoid dehydration and fatigue.
Wear comfortable shoes during travel and take rest between rituals.
Carry a mask when it is very crowded in the Tawaf area or Sa'i path to avoid infection.
Keep an ID card or bracelet with campaign details and phone number to avoid getting lost.
Determine a clear meeting point (such as a specific gate) with your family in case of separation.

spiritual.title: Spiritual & Behavioral Guidelines
items: Evoke sincere intention for Allah and stay away from showing off and excessive photography in rituals.
Display good manners, patience, and kindness to the elderly and weak during crowding.
Keep completely away from obscene language, wickedness, disputes, and quarrels that spoil the reward.
Seize the noble times such as the last third of the night and sitting in the Sacred Mosque.
Allocate a specific time to supplicate for all family, relatives, and general Muslims.

dialog.title: Are you sure you want to reset the bag?
dialog.desc: This action will delete all checked items and start over. This action cannot be undone.
